channel.title: Special Access Program on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Special Access Program on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Pentagon Refuses to Search for ‘Immaculate Constellation’ Emails
item.description:
The Department of War has refused to conduct a Freedom of Information Act search for emails related to the “Immaculate Constellation” program. This refusal is based on the department’s assertion that the program does not exist, therefore no responsive records could exist. This stance is unusual, as FOIA typically requires agencies to search for records regardless of the perceived validity of the subject matter. The phrase “Immaculate Constellation” entered public discourse in late 2024, leading to congressional attention and an official denial from the Department of Defense. Other agencies, like the NSA, have responded to similar requests with Glomar responses, acknowledging the request without confirming or denying the existence of records.

Source: https://www.theblackvault.com/documentarchive/pentagon-refuses-to-search-for-immaculate-constellation-emails
